zh.lifeSummary: 當Ewyn de Cornwall於1175年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾布福德時，她的父親Henry FitzCount29歲，母親Mathilde de Normandie29歲。她於1199年與Hugh de Hill在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1234年在她的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾布福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ewyn de Cornwall于1175年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾布福德时，她的父亲Henry FitzCount29岁，母亲Mathilde de Normandie29岁。她于1199年与Hugh de Hill在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1234年在她的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾布福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cornwall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from the county of Cornwall, which is named with the Old English tribal name Cornwealas. This is from Kernow (the term that the Cornish used to refer to themselves, a word of uncertain etymology, perhaps connected with a Celtic element meaning ‘horn, headland’), + Old English wealas ‘strangers, foreigners’, the term used by the Anglo-Saxons for British-speaking people.

variants.name: Cornwell
meanings: habitational name from Cornwell in Oxfordshire, named from Old English corn, a metathesized form of cron, cran ‘crane’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

variant of Cornwall or Cornhill; in southeastern England mainly a habitational name from Cornhill in London but elsewhere alternatively from Cornhill (Northumberland) or one of the many minor places so called, often becoming Cornell .

variants.name: Corney
meanings: habitational name from Corney in Cumbria or Corney in Hertfordshire (now known as Corneybury), from Old English corn ‘grain’ or corn, a metathesized form of cron, cran ‘crane’ + ēg ‘island’. It seems possible, from the distribution of early forms, that it may also derive from a lost place in Lancashire. Alternatively, a habitational name from Corney (Lancashire), later named Corneyrow, now Corner Row or Cornoe in Greenhalgh (alias Greenall), in the parish of Kirkham. Corney was sometimes pronounced and spelled Cornah, Corner, Cornall, Gorney, and Gornall.
perhaps a shortened form of   Cornwall   or   Cornish  , or a metathesized form of   Croney  .

nameMeanings.name: Ewyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a byname from Welsh gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’. See also Wyn .

variants.name: Gwynn
meanings: Originally a byname from Welsh gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’. See also Wyn .

en.lifeSummary: When Ewyn de Cornwall was born in 1175, in Burford, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry FitzCount, was 29 and her mother, Mathilde de Normandie, was 29. She married Hugh de Hill in 1199, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1234, in her hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Burford, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ewyn de Cornwall est née en 1175, à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry FitzCount, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Normandie, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh de Hill en 1199, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1234, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ewyn de Cornwall 1175 in Burford, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry FitzCount 29 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de Normandie 29. Sie hat 1199 in Shropshire, England Hugh de Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1234 im Alter von 59 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Burford, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ewyn de Cornwall è nata il nel 1175 nel Burford, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry FitzCount, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Mathilde de Normandie, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Hugh de Hill nel 1199, nel Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1234, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Burford, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ewyn de Cornwallが1175年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードで生まれた時，父Henry FitzCountは29歳，母Mathilde de Normandieは29歳であった。1199年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでHugh de Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1234年に故郷で59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ewyn de Cornwall(이)가 1175년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 버퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry FitzCount(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de Normandie(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1199년 영국 슈럽실르에서 Hugh de Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1234년 그녀의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 버퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ewyn de Cornwall nasceu em 1175, em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry FitzCount, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Normandie, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh de Hill em 1199, em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1234, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ewyn de Cornwall родилась в 1175 г. в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry FitzCount было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Normandie, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Hill в 1199 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1234 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ewyn de Cornwall nació en 1175, en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry FitzCount, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Normandie, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Hugh de Hill en 1199, en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1234, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
